title: Drosophila Schneider 2 (S2) cell culture
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"zahsc","text":"Protocol for Drosophila Schneider 2 (S2) cell culture used in our Nature paper.\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"puonu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rjfkb","text":"S2 cells (macrophage-like lineage) grow at room temperature without CO2, as a loose, semi-adherent monolayer in tissue culture flasks and plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":70,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"pnbvv","text":"Complete Schneider’s Drosophila medium recipe:\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tbq6v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pyjcu","text":"HI FBS (EuroClone) - 10%\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"syv7m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"enlbk","text":"Penicillin/Streptomycin (EuroClone) - 50 U/ml\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ktdrx","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5skar","text":"Conditioned complete Schneider’s medium - 25%\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"elcnp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yjerj","text":"Schneider’s Drosophila medium (Gibco) - to volume","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Seed S2 cells at a concentration of 1 x 10 6 cells/ml in 100 x 20 mm tissue culture plates in 10 ml of conditioned medium (supplemented with 25% of the medium in which cells have been formerly grown).
Incubate in a 28°C incubator (no CO2 requirements) and split cells at 1:2 to 1:5 dilution when cell density is between 6 to 20 x 10 6 cells/ml.
If planning to perform LPS or PGN stimulation on S2 cells, pretreat cells with 1 microM 20-hydroxy-ecdysone for 24 hours before stimulation.

CD14 regulates the dendritic cell life cycle after LPS exposure through NFAT activation by Ivan Zanoni, Renato Ostuni, Giusy Capuano, Maddalena Collini, Michele Caccia, Antonella Ellena Ronchi, Marcella Rocchetti, Francesca Mingozzi, Maria Foti, Giuseppe Chirico, Barbara Costa, Antonio Zaza, Paola Ricciardi-Castagnoli & Francesca Granucci published in Nature on 15 May, 2009 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/nature08118
